    A

    addPhoto(Photo) - Method in class model.Album
    Adds a photo if it is not already in the album.

    Adds a photo to an album.

    Adds a tag to the photo.

    Creates a user.

    Adds a user-defined tag type.

    Returns whether a photo path is already in the album.

    D

    DATA_DIRECTORY - Static variable in class util.DataStore
    Root data directory.
    DATA_FILE - Static variable in class util.DataStore
    Serialized application data file.

    Loads and saves the application's serialized data.
    deleteAlbum(String) - Method in class model.User
    Deletes an album.

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in class model.Album
    Compares albums by name.
    equals(Object) - Method in class model.Photo
    Compares photos by absolute file path.
    equals(Object) - Method in class model.Tag
    Compares tags by tag type and value.
    equals(Object) - Method in class model.TagDefinition
    Compares tag definitions by name.
    equals(Object) - Method in class model.User
    Compares users by username.

    G

    getAbsoluteFilePath() - Method in class model.Photo
    Returns the absolute file path.
    getAlbum(String) - Method in class model.User
    Finds an album by name.
    getAlbumName() - Method in class controller.CreateAlbumFromSearchDialogController
    Returns the entered album name.
    getAlbumNames() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the album names in insertion order.
    getAlbums() - Method in class model.User
    Returns all albums in insertion order.
    getCaption() - Method in class model.Photo
    Returns the caption.
    getData() - Method in class app.Photos
    Returns the application data.
    getDataFilePath() - Static method in class util.DataStore
    Returns the serialized data file path.
    getDefinition() - Method in class model.Tag
    Returns the tag definition.
    getEarliestPhotoDate() - Method in class model.Album
    Returns the earliest photo date in the album.
    getLatestPhotoDate() - Method in class model.Album
    Returns the latest photo date in the album.
    getName() - Method in class model.Album
    Returns the album name.
    getName() - Method in class model.TagDefinition
    Returns the tag type name.
    getPhoto(String) - Method in class model.User
    Finds a photo in the user's library by absolute path.
    getPhotoByPath(String) - Method in class model.Album
    Finds a photo by absolute path inside the album.
    getPhotoCount() - Method in class model.Album
    Returns the number of photos in the album.
    getPhotoDate() - Method in class model.Photo
    Returns the photo date from the filesystem.
    getPhotos() - Method in class model.Album
    Returns photos in insertion order.
    getPhotos() - Method in class model.User
    Returns all photos owned by this user.
    getStockDirectoryPath() - Static method in class util.DataStore
    Returns the stock photo directory path.
    getTagDefinition(String) - Method in class model.PhotosData
    Finds a tag definition by name.
    getTagDefinitions() - Method in class model.PhotosData
    Returns all tag definitions in insertion order.
    getTags() - Method in class model.Photo
    Returns all tags.
    getTypeName() - Method in class model.Tag
    Returns the tag type name.
    getUser(String) - Method in class model.PhotosData
    Finds a user by username.
    getUsername() - Method in class model.User
    Returns the username.
    getUsers() - Method in class model.PhotosData
    Returns all users in insertion order.
    getValue() - Method in class model.Tag
    Returns the tag value.

    H

    hasAlbum(String) - Method in class model.User
    Returns whether the user already has an album name.
    hashCode() - Method in class model.Album
    Returns a hash code based on name.
    hashCode() - Method in class model.Photo
    Returns a hash code based on absolute file path.
    hashCode() - Method in class model.Tag
    Returns a hash code based on tag type and value.
    hashCode() - Method in class model.TagDefinition
    Returns a hash code based on name.
    hashCode() - Method in class model.User
    Returns a hash code based on username.
    hasPhoto(String) - Method in class model.User
    Returns whether the user already has a photo path in the library.
    hasTag(TagDefinition, String) - Method in class model.Photo
    Returns whether the photo has the exact tag.
    hasTagDefinition(String) - Method in class model.PhotosData
    Returns whether a tag type already exists.
    hasTagType(String) - Method in class model.Photo
    Returns whether the photo has a tag type.
    hasUser(String) - Method in class model.PhotosData
    Returns whether a username already exists.

    I

    isMultiValue() - Method in class model.TagDefinition
    Returns whether the tag type supports multiple values.

    Returns whether the tag type is built in.

    R

    removePhoto(Photo) - Method in class model.Album
    Removes a photo from the album.
    removePhotoByPath(String) - Method in class model.Album
    Removes a photo by path.

    Removes a photo from an album.
    removeTag(TagDefinition, String) - Method in class model.Photo
    Removes a tag from the photo.
    removeTagsByType(String) - Method in class model.Photo
    Removes all tags of one tag type from the photo.

    Removes a user.
